control_description: All AI use cases must be registered before pilot or production use
Each AI use case must have an accountable business owner
Source data must be reviewed for ownership quality metadata lineage classification and access
AI use cases involving personal data require privacy review
AI tools must be reviewed for access logging hosting and misuse risks
Third-party AI tools must be reviewed for data use retention subprocessors and security
High or medium risk AI outputs require human review before action
AI outputs must be sampled and checked against source data or business rules
Material AI errors privacy issues or misuse events must be logged and assigned
AI systems must have documentation of purpose data sources limitations risks and controls
